title: arabis magna
intro: Arabis magna, also known as the Large Rock-cress, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional European folk medicine, where it has been used to treat various ailments. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing coughs, and alleviating respiratory issues. Arabis magna can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves and flowers can also be used in salads or as a garnish, although its most common use is in traditional herbal medicine.
